subject: Pink and white orchid-mantis Pokemon leaping through the air with arms extended, trailing green energy streaks against a bright sky
description: A pink and white Pokemon with large petal-like extensions on its arms and a flower-like head-crest leaps dynamically through a bright blue sky. Its arms are extended in a wide slashing arc, and vivid green energy streaks trail behind the motion. Below the figure, a lush green meadow and flowers are visible. The figure's design evokes both an orchid mantis and a dancer — elongated limbs, petal-shaped forearm extensions, and a graceful pose. The illustration is clean digital art with vibrant color saturation.
foreground: Pink and white orchid-mantis Pokemon in leaping slash pose with green energy trails
background: Bright blue sky, green meadow, colorful flowers below
